In 2020, you could afford a $758,000 house with 20% down on a $2,500/month 30-year mortgage.

Now, you can afford a $443,000 house with 20% down on a $2,500/month 30-year mortgage.

Needless to say, things are changing quickly.

The @WSJ on the highest US 30-year #mortgage rates for decades.

Rather than hit residential prices, the major immediate impact of this surge is to dissuade some homeowners with existing #mortgages (at much lower rates) from moving.
